subject: Product Management
title: Opportunity Solution Trees
description: A quick win: understand Opportunity Solution Trees.

hook.text: Teresa Torres invented the opportunity solution tree — a visual map connecting outcomes to experiments.

buildup.text: At the top sits the desired outcome. Below it, opportunities (customer needs). Below those, potential solutions.

discovery.text: Each solution branches into experiments that test assumptions cheaply before the team commits to building.

twist.text: The tree forces teams to consider multiple solutions per opportunity — breaking the habit of jumping to the first idea.

climax.text: OSTs have become one of the most adopted product discovery tools in the industry since Torres published them in 2021.

punchline.text: One outcome. Many opportunities. Even more solutions.

quiz.question: What does an opportunity solution tree map?
options: Outcomes to customer opportunities to solutions to experiments
